journal_entry.description: Deposit received for future moving services
journal_entry.rationale: Atlas received $5,000 cash deposit for moving services to be performed in one month. Under IFRS 15, revenue is recognized when performance obligations are satisfied. Since the services have not yet been performed, the deposit creates a liability (deferred revenue/customer deposit). Cash increases (asset debit) and deferred revenue increases (liability credit).

output_debit_classifier.reason: Cash received for services not yet performed creates a liability (deferred revenue). One asset increase (cash), one liability increase (deferred revenue). No HST recorded as moving services are HST-exempt in Canada.

output_credit_classifier.reason: Cash received for services not yet performed creates a liability (deferred revenue). One asset increase (cash), one liability increase (deferred revenue). No HST recorded as moving services are HST-exempt in Canada.

output_debit_corrector.reason: Cash received for services not yet performed creates a liability (deferred revenue). One asset increase (cash), one liability increase (deferred revenue). No HST recorded as moving services are HST-exempt in Canada.

output_credit_corrector.reason: Cash received for services not yet performed creates a liability (deferred revenue). One asset increase (cash), one liability increase (deferred revenue). No HST recorded as moving services are HST-exempt in Canada.
